<!-- Doanh Nhân Trẻ Đồng Nai - Vietnamese News Website -->

## Project Overview
- Next.js 14 with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS
- Vietnamese news/association website
- Pages: Home, Category (slug), Article Detail
- Mock data for development

## Tech Stack
- Next.js 14 (App Router)
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- React Icons

## Development
- `npm run dev` to start development server
- `npm run build` to build for production
